LeidenUniv.Tools

Class ObjectCounter4D_

  • java.lang.Object
    • LeidenUniv.Tools.ObjectCounter4D_
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ij.plugin.PlugIn

    public class ObjectCounter4D_
extends java.lang.Object
implements ij.plugin.PlugIn
    Counts the number of 3d objects over time
    Author:
    willemsejj

      void run(java.lang.String arg)
      To run it from ImageJ/FIJI If there is no image it will create a test image and run the plugin on that

    • Constructor Detail

      • ObjectCounter4D_

        public ObjectCounter4D_(ij.ImagePlus imp)
        Parameters:
        imp - Runs the counter on the given image

      • ObjectCounter4D_

        public ObjectCounter4D_()

    • Method Detail

      • run

        public void run(java.lang.String arg)
        To run it from ImageJ/FIJI If there is no image it will create a test image and run the plugin on that
        Specified by:
        run in interface ij.plugin.PlugIn

      • createTestImage

        public ij.ImagePlus createTestImage()
        Returns:
        used if there is no image open creates a 512x512 100 frames, 100 slices image with 10 random dots Each dot moves at random 10% in any direction every timeframe

      • getDots

        public java.util.ArrayList<mcib3d.geom.Objects3DPopulation> getDots(ij.ImagePlus In)
        Parameters:
        In - The image that needs to be analysed
        Returns:
        The Objects3DPopulation ArrayList (Used from the 3d suite from Thomas Boudier)

      • main

        public static void main(java.lang.String[] arg)
